subject: fix(security,reliability): XSS hardening, export race condition, edge cases
body:
Apply fixes from code review trigger sweep:

- AdCanvas: whitelist-only DOMPurify config (ALLOWED_TAGS/ALLOWED_ATTR)
  prevents XSS via img/iframe even if DOMPurify defaults change
- ExportButtons: replace fixed 300ms setTimeout with double waitForPaint()
  for reliable page capture on slow devices
- ExportButtons: add seconds to timestamp (YYMMdd-HHmmss) preventing
  same-minute export filename collisions
- App: guard against division by zero in autoScale when platform
  dimensions are 0
- useHistory: clarify positional image comparison comment (behavior
  was already correct — IDs compared by array index)
- designStorage: only set migrationDone=true after success, so failed
  migrations retry on next app load instead of silently losing data
- TutorialModal: update "Structured" label to "Guided" to match
  current ContentTab UI

Tags: security, export, reliability, tutorial
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: code-review-sweep
Semver: patch

title: XSS hardening, export race condition, edge cases
